feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Master Data Governance
feed.subtitle: SAP Master Data Governance Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Hello everyone! How can i migrate my data In S4/HANA on premise, from "T" system to "P"?
MDG-F : No valid target content area found
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I'm getting the error shown below on the MDG UI screen. This happens when I open a new create change request for Financial Accounting Governance. Click New and select
G/L Account Centrally, the same problem occurs when creating a cost center.

Link Log. Actions with UI Application and Bus. Act.: Standard Definition is configured normally.

 

What could be the cause of this error?

How can I solve this problem?

entry.title: Key differences between MDG on SAP S/4 HANA and SAP S/4 HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Can anyone tell the differences between MDG on SAP S/4 HANA and SAP S/4 HANA Cloud. How feasible it is to move current MDG system on S/4 Hana on-premise to S/4 Hana Cloud. Do S/4 Hana cloud supports all objects in MDG like Financials, Business partners, Material etc...

Any SAP blogs/ Support portal links would help.

entry.title: How to replicate deletion in MDG-F manually?
entry.content:
Hey,

If a cost center is deleted but the replication timing is set to manual, how can this deletion get replicated to the target system so the cost center gets deleted there too?

Releasing the edition didn't help. The Delta Replication parameter is set to "Y" already.

Thanks for your answers! 

Cheers.

entry.title: SAP MDG HANA Search for custom entity
entry.content:
I have created MDG HANA search View for our Custom Entity and in Define Joins, Field Mapping, and Authorizations for Reuse Tables maintained in MDGIMG all the mapping and condition.

when I try to search from Search Application getting below error.

Error in execution of query: invalid table name: Could not find table/view ********::*******_Reuse in schema SAPHANADB: line 1 col 99 (at pos 98)

Appreciate your inputs.

entry.title: SAP MDG: merge or transfer data between two vendors into new vendor and transfer postings
entry.content:
Hi Folks, 

How to perform merge or transfer data between two vendors into new vendor and transfer postings in SAP MDG.

Thanks,
Suggu Sandeep.

entry.title: BW4HANA - SICF - Maintain master data error
entry.content:
Hi experts,

When we try to maintain master data, we receive the next error:

"App could not be opened because the SAP UI5 component of the application could not be loaded.

Failed to load UI5 component for navigation intent "#BWInfoObject-maintainMasterData?ignoreNavigationTargetInSearch=true&iobjName=ZREPOS&sap-app-origin-hint="

I think there is a service missing to activate, could you tell me which one it is?

Thanks in advance

Regards,

Antonio

entry.title: Create Custom Object Identifier for Key Mapping
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts,

Our requirement is to Store the value of BP Identification Number for Specific BP Type in the Key Mapping.

To store the Key Mapping we have found relevant Class and Method. But SAP standard does not provide any Business Object Identifier for BP Identification Number (BUT0ID-IDNUMBER).

For that we have to create a Custom Identifier under Key Mapping Node.

Is there any specific Standard Document or Blog/Pointers to proceed with the Configuration.

 

Thanks and Regards,

Deepak Maurya

entry.title: Connect SAP Master Data TO CPI
entry.content:
Good Day Everyone,

I need advice on how to connect SAP to a CPI IFlow. 

The end objective of the iflow is to gather information from an SFTP (a PDF), look up the vendor ID in SAP, and from that vendor ID, grab its email from the master data in SAP, and then send the PDF through email adapter.

We got everything figured out except on how to connect SAP ---> CPI.

Thanks for the help.

entry.title: CVI Conversion - Precheck master data errors
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We are doing brownfield conversion ECC to S/4 HANA. As Pre-conversion activity on ECC system we have take Precheck master data error report.

We would like to know how to resolve number range overlapping error?

what is the best way to resolve this

Thank you

entry.title: Re: My catalog does not appear in fiori launchpad
entry.content:
Hi  @MaximoSanchez 

Firstly, i am not able to understand the German at some places 
 
Did you get connect with Security in your team ?

As per my observation you missed this thing 
Semantic Object, 
T-Code: /n/ui2/semobj 

As i created a blog on this check out the steps of sequence:
https://suggu-sandeep.medium.com/sap-fiori-tile-creation-2023-2dc76cb952a8

If same issue let's come back & comment over here again...

Thanks, 
Suggu Sandeep.

entry.title: Re: Looking for a list of master data objects which are c...
entry.content:
Hi @j_kang 

Apart from SAP Community & SAP Product Page, 
Sharing the info. which related to SAP MDG Cloud which shared in LinkedIn 

Check out whole set of documents which he posted:
https://www.linkedin.com/in/soeren-hinkel-130785/recent-activity/documents/

Thanks, 
Suggu Sandeep.

entry.title: Re: BW4HANA - SICF - Maintain master data error
entry.content:
Hi @alopezbarranco 

In the URL It self it states - ZREPOS

Thanks, 
Suggu Sandeep.

entry.title: S_alr_87012179 report output. I am not able to view it as rows and columns
entry.content:
Hi,

For report output s_alr_87012179 in order to view it as rows and columns what should i do?

Thank you,

Alex

entry.title: CVI - Re-Run of Synchronization after post conversion
entry.content:
Dear All,

In CVI during brownfield implementation we do synchronization of customers & vendors to BP on ERP system as  pre conversion activity.

Post conversion on S/4 HANA do we need to Re-run synchronization? because we observed bank details are not getting updated correctly in BUT0BK table whenever it get changed in customers KNBK or vendors LFBK after synchronization on ERP.

Thank you

entry.title: Warning message : Duplicate check not possible; required fields Tax number not filled
entry.content:
Hi Experts ,

We are encountering a warning message " Duplicate check not possible; required fields Tax number not filled "  even though post populating the tax number along with tax category. Can anyone help why this warning message is popped up and how to resolve this issue.

Thanks & Regards, 

Resh

entry.title: Could I Issue permits for a work order list at same time like a mass change?
Bank Master Data Cockpit
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are planning to implement Bank Master Data Cockpit (Fiori App DBIC2 ) however we cannot  find any documentation about how to load a file via batch job. We have manually loaded file with bank data, but we want to automate the process of loading the file via batch job. Can you please let us know whether this is possible?

Thanks.

entry.title: How to mass upload planned prices (future) in costing 2 view for materials?
entry.content: I have a requirement where the business wants to upload planned price (future) in costing 2 view of material master in mass. Are there any standard upload template or t-code available or do we need to upload it via LSMW / BDC? I have checked MM17 and MASS t-codes but planned price field is not available to upload in mass in these t-codes.

entry.title: What is the difference between creating BOM in CS01 vs C201?
entry.content:
When creating the BOM, why are there two methods (CS01 vs C201)?  What are the advantages/disadvantages of one over the other?  

Are there some example scenarios that can help me understand how these are applied and how to decide between which one to use?
